name: Oven Barbequed Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove head and tail from salmon and fillet.
2. Place one-half skin side down on a large sheet of foil in a baking pan.
3. Add spices and layer with lemon, onion, and bacon.
4. Mix 1/2 cup syrup and ketchup; pour 1/2 of this mixture over the fillet.
5. Place second fillet flesh side down over the first; pour remaining sauce over all.
6. Seal with foil and bake at 400°F for 30-40 minutes.
7. Fish will flake easily with a fork in the thickest part when done. Do not overbake.
8. Serve hot with oven-baked potatoes or corn, along with a green salad. Serves 6.
Source: Alaska Seafood Cookbook
Reprinted by permission from the Alaska Seafood Marketing Institute
